---
title: 'Grading Runners: A Pilot Study to Reverse Engineer Patterns to Understand the Sizing of a Population'
date: '2025-01-01'
author: [Susan L Sokolowski, Jake Searcy, Anish Dulal, Chris Stone, KJ Fightmaster]
publication: International Textile and Apparel Association Annual Conference Proceedings, **1** (2025).
categories: [health]
url_source: 'https://www.iastatedigitalpress.com/itaa/article/id/21754/'
url_preprint: ''
journ: International Textile and Apparel Association Annual Conference Proceedings
issue: 1
page: ''
year: 2025
image: ''
pub_number: 18
---
